title: taraxacum subcalanthodium
intro: Taraxacum subcalanthodium, also known as the yellow dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum subcalanthodium include reducing symptoms of digestive disorders, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
